scripts.dev:web: pnpm run compile:web && pnpm --dir ../../.. exec vite --config packages/examples/my-demo/vite.config.ts
scripts.build:web: pnpm run compile:web && pnpm --dir ../../.. exec vite build --config packages/examples/my-demo/vite.config.ts
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run compile:web && pnpm --dir ../../.. exec tsc -p packages/examples/my-demo/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false
